---
name: Performance Improvement
about: Improve system performance
title: "[Performance] "
labels: performance
assignees: ""
---

## Description
Describe the performance problem.

## Current Behavior
Explain the current performance issue.

Example:
- Slow API response
- High memory usage
- Slow database query

## Expected Behavior
Describe the expected performance improvement.

## Metrics

Current:
- Response time:
- CPU usage:
- Memory usage:

Target:
- Response time:
- CPU usage:
- Memory usage:

## Technical Notes
Optional technical information.

Example:
- Database query optimization
- Add caching
- Reduce API calls

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Performance improved
- [ ] Benchmark verified
- [ ] No functional regression

## Tasks

- [ ] Analyze bottleneck
- [ ] Implement optimization
- [ ] Benchmark performance
- [ ] Code review
